title: Toy Story 4 Kids Cinch Bag Travel Backpack with 4pc Sticker Sheet Bundle Set
description:
Is your child a Toy Story fan? Then this drawstring cinch backpack and matching set of stickers bundle is a must-have gift this year! The backpack and stickers both feature characters from the hit movie franchise: Buzz Lightyear, Woody, and more! Kids will love showing off their favorite Toy Story characters at school! The drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use. The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids

Toy Story 4 Kids Cinch Bag Travel Backpack with 4pc Sticker Sheet Bundle Set

Is your child a Toy Story fan? Then this drawstring cinch backpack and matching set of stickers bundle is a must-have gift this year! The backpack and stickers both feature characters from the hit movie franchise: Buzz Lightyear, Woody, and more! Kids will love showing off their favorite Toy Story characters at school!

The drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use.

Key Features

  • LICENSED KIDS’ BACKPACK - Officially licensed by Disney Pixar kids’ backpack features iconic “Space Ranger” characters from the hit movie franchise: Buzz Lightyear and Woody! Your child can show off their favorite Toy Story characters with their friends at school
  • DURABLE MATERIAL - Cinch backpacks are made of durable, water-resistant polyester to protect your child’s back-to-school materials and supplies even in inclement weather. Graphic design on front of bag will be sure to turn heads
  • CUTE STATIONERY - Children can decorate their school supplies, artwork, and crafting projects with cute stickers; Stationery stickers encourage creativity and imagination
  • SAFE FOR KIDS - All 4 sheets of stickers are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Durable and vibrant sticker material
  • SPECIFICATIONS - 5 piece bundle set: (1) cinch bag and (4) sticker sheets; All pieces officially licensed Toy Story 4; Recommended age: 3+ years; Colors: assorted

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TS4STICKBPBUN
  • UPC: 795229238968
  • Color: Toy Story
  • Size: Medium

The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids. The bag itself is made of durable water-resistant polyester to protect your child’s school materials and supplies rain or shine.

Stickers can be a great addition to any kid's school supplies. Fun and educational stickers are an excellent option for kids to add to their homework and school art projects, and stationery stickers can encourage extra creativity and imagination!

All 4 sticker sheets and the backpack are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision. The durable and vibrant stickers are sure to add a fun flair to any art project. Make sure to grab this set of stickers and a matching backpack for your little Toy Story fan!
